title: Pre-reg iteration 3 full: 4 candidates (FNO_medium_single, LSTM_single, FNO_medium_multi, LSTM_multi)
summary: FNO_medium_single is positive on 5/5 US assets on BOTH H1 and H2 (with Bonferroni-corrected significance on 4/5 each). This is a robust result on US. International generalization is mixed (2/5 positive, 3/5 negative) because the model was trained on US data only.
honest_finding: FNO_medium is now ROBUST: positive on 5/5 US assets on both H1 (2025+) and H2 (2010-2014 true holdout). The cascade is also robust (negative on both). The FNO is +0.10 to +0.30 on both windows, while cascade is -0.16 to -0.32. The FNO is positive where cascade is negative - they measure different things.
